hook: A good match is not just someone attractive; it is someone whose signals make the next step worth taking.
body: Filtering early saves time, but more importantly it protects your attention from getting trapped in low-fit dynamics.

hook: Many men match based on looks alone and only start evaluating fit after they are already emotionally invested.
body: Treat mutual curiosity, clarity, and basic lifestyle alignment as part of attraction from the start.

body: A profile that is less flashy but more legible may lead to a much better date than one that only spikes fantasy.

body: Before swiping right, ask whether the profile gives you enough signal to imagine a calm, real interaction.
